---
title: "sanitize_thesaurus.py"
path: "C:/Users/Craig/Corvus/CorvusStar/src/tools/data/sanitize_thesaurus.py"
loc: 53
complexity: 9
logic_score: 2.12
style_score: 3.33
intel_score: 8.95
overall_score: 4.98
---

## Intent
Python module facilitating ThesaurusSanitizer, sanitize_clusters.

## Interaction Protocol
Import ThesaurusSanitizer and call its primary methods.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 2.1/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.3/10
- **Intel [I]**: 8.9/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 20 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [pathlib](file://pathlib)

### Exports
- `ThesaurusSanitizer`
- `sanitize_clusters`
- `execute`
- `main`
